settings.title:
Big Thanks To Our
Friends & Partners

slides.content: “I was blown away by how personal each talk was. Being there helped me to think about how what and why I do what I do, in new ways.”
slides.name: Caroline Pettersson
slides.title:
Founder & Design Director
Collective

slides.content: “Mind blown, this conference was so much more than I expected! I was inspired and motivated in so many ways by the speakers who shared stories.”
slides.name: Jeanne Zimmerman
slides.title:
Visual Design Student,
Design Academy

slides.content: “ Epic two day event with legend speakers that will inspire any creative or professional! Highly recommend to everyone involved in the creative industries.”
slides.name: Joseph Torres
slides.title:
Product Manager,
Ecstatic
